channel.title: The Record — AgentCanary
channel.description: Market intelligence with receipts. Daily macro briefs with regime tracking, whale alerts, narrative scores, and hindsight-scored calls.

item.description:
Markets reflected stagflationary pressures as the VIX spiked to 27 while gold pushed to $4,403, sign… — MARKET WRAP — Mar 24, 2026
Markets reflected stagflationary pressures as the VIX spiked to 27 while gold pushed to $4,403, signaling investor flight to hard assets amid persistent inflation concerns.
